# overrideTitle

**Instance Property**

A string to use to override the title of the item’s type.

## Declaration

```swift
var overrideTitle: String? { get set }
```

## Discussion

Use this value to dynamically override the title of the custom item.

## Configuring an item

- **type**: A type with an identifier that matches a value in the app’s configuration.

items.description: A type with an identifier that matches a value in the app’s configuration.
items.name: type

title: overrideTitle
